evals.description: Skill triggers on a request to add meta tags to a page
evals.prompt: My blog post page is missing meta tags. Can you help me add a title tag, meta description, and canonical URL?

evals.description: Skill triggers on heading structure question
evals.prompt: I have multiple H1 tags on my landing page. Is that a problem for SEO?

evals.description: Skill triggers on image alt text request
evals.prompt: How should I write alt text for product images on my e-commerce site?

evals.description: Agent can produce a complete HTML meta tag block
evals.prompt: Write the complete set of HTML meta tags for a blog post about 'Top 10 JavaScript Frameworks in 2025' on a site called TechPulse at techpulse.io.

evals.description: Agent produces correct Next.js generateMetadata for a dynamic blog post
evals.prompt: Show me how to implement generateMetadata in Next.js App Router for a blog post page at app/blog/[slug]/page.tsx. The post has title, excerpt, ogImage, and publishedAt fields.

evals.description: Agent produces correct Nuxt 3 useSeoMeta pattern
evals.prompt: How do I set the title, description, and Open Graph tags for a dynamic product page in Nuxt 3? The data comes from a useFetch call.

evals.description: Agent produces correct Remix V2 meta function with loader data
evals.prompt: Write a Remix meta function for a blog post route that uses loader data to set the page title, description, og:image, and canonical URL.

evals.description: Agent produces a correct semantic HTML page structure
evals.prompt: Rewrite this div-soup page structure to use proper semantic HTML5 elements for SEO: <div id='header'>, <div id='nav'>, <div id='main'>, <div class='article'>, <div id='sidebar'>, <div id='footer'>.

evals.description: Agent correctly identifies and fixes multiple H1 anti-pattern
evals.prompt: Review this page structure - it has an H1 for the site logo, another H1 for the page title, and a third H1 for a featured section. What's wrong and how do I fix it?

evals.description: Agent flags missing canonical as a duplicate content risk
evals.prompt: My product pages are accessible at both /products/widget and /products/widget/ (with trailing slash) and also with UTM parameters like /products/widget?utm_source=email. Is this a problem?

evals.description: Agent correctly flags title tag too long
evals.prompt: My title tag is: 'The Ultimate Complete Comprehensive Guide to JavaScript Frameworks for Modern Web Development in 2025 | TechPulse Blog'. Is this OK for SEO?

evals.description: Agent does not hallucinate a Next.js SEO plugin that does not exist
evals.prompt: What Next.js plugin should I install to automatically handle all my SEO meta tags?

evals.description: Agent correctly loads the Astro reference file for Astro SEO questions
evals.prompt: How do I set up SEO meta tags in an Astro site with content collections? I want title, description, and OG tags driven by the frontmatter of each Markdown post.
